title: A Beacon of Light
lines: The cold, heavy weight of the tactical flashlight feels solid in your hand. Its metallic casing is scarred with use, but the glass lens remains clear.
You press the switch, and a sharp, brilliant beam of pure white light cuts through the eternal twilight of the village.
For the first time in hours, you can see exactly where you are standing. It is a small victory, but a victory nonetheless.
